items.title: Israel PM orders strikes on Beirut suburbs as Hezbollah conflict escalates
items.dek: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.
items.body: Benjamin Netanyahu says the Hezbollah stronghold of Dahieh will be targeted in response to attacks on Israeli civilians.

items.title: France seized sanctioned Russian oil tanker with UK help, Macron says
items.dek: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.
items.body: A British helicopter provided support during the operation on Sunday, the UK ministry of defence says.
